<?php /** * Copyright Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates. All Rights Reserved. * SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0. */ namespace AWS\CRT\HTTP; class Response extends Message { private $status_code; public function __construct($method, $path, $query, $headers, $status_code) { parent::__construct($method, $path, $query, $headers); $this->status_code = $status_code; } public static function marshall($response) { return parent::marshall($response); } public static function unmarshall($buf) { return parent::_unmarshall($buf, Response::class); } public function status_code() { return $this->status_code; } }
